items.name: Beef Tapa
items.description: House marinated beef strips, served with garlic rice, fried egg and mango salsa.
items.simplified_description: A traditional Filipino dish featuring marinated beef.

items.name: Pork Tocino
items.description: Pan fried sugar-cured pork, served with garlic rice, fried egg and mango salsa.
items.simplified_description: A sweet and savory Filipino breakfast dish made with pork.

items.name: Longanisa
items.description: Sweet skinless sausage made of ground pork and served with garlic rice, fried egg and mango salsa.
items.simplified_description: A sweet, garlicky pork sausage popular in Filipino cuisine.

items.name: Daing na Bangus
items.description: Milkfish house marinated with vinegar and spices, served with garlic rice, fried egg and mango salsa.
items.simplified_description: A seasoned milkfish dish from the Philippines.

items.name: Longga Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Double longanisa patty, cheddar cheese, tomato, avocado, on croissant with spicy garlic aioli. Served with hashbrown or salad.
items.simplified_description: A savory sandwich with pork sausage on a croissant.

items.name: Crispy Sisig
items.description: Spicy crispy pork belly with red and green pepper, red onion, tossed with mayo and served with garlic rice and fried egg.
items.simplified_description: A spicy, crunchy pork dish served with rice.

items.name: Ube French Toast
items.description: Ube white toast dipped in milk, eggs, nutmeg and cinnamon mixture with ube cream cheese and drizzled with condensed milk.
items.simplified_description: A sweet French toast featuring ube, a type of purple yam from the Philippines.

items.name: Tapa Poutine
items.description: All time favorite BEEF TAPA, hashbrowns, curd cheese, 2 poached eggs, hollandaise sauce and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: A Filipino-Canadian fusion dish combining beef tapa and poutine.

items.name: Ensaymada Waffle
items.description: Filipino inspired pastry topped with sweet cream cheese, and grated cheese.
items.simplified_description: A sweet, fluffy pastry served as a waffle.

items.name: Buko Pandan Pancake
items.description: Pandan flavored pancake with sweetened coconut string.
items.simplified_description: A pancake flavored with pandan, a tropical plant.

items.name: Sunrise Steak
items.description: Grilled 6oz-7oz sirloin steak, served with garlic rice or hashbrown, fried egg, mango salsa and gravy.
items.simplified_description: A hearty steak breakfast with classic sides.

items.name: Classic Breakfast
items.description: Choice of bacon, maple sausage, apple sausage or ham, 2 fried eggs, hashbrowns and choice of toast or classic pancake.
items.simplified_description: A traditional breakfast plate with various meat options.

items.name: French Toast
items.description: White toast dipped in the richness of milk, eggs, nutmeg and cinnamon, topped with cream cheese. Served with fruits, whipped cream and maple syrup.
items.simplified_description: Classic French toast served with toppings.

items.name: Loco Moco
items.description: Grilled hamburger patty over garlic Hawaiian rice, caramelized mushroom, onions, topped with bacon jam, gravy and 2 fried eggs.
items.simplified_description: A Hawaiian dish featuring rice, a burger patty, and gravy.

items.name: Philly Steak Poutine
items.description: Sliced steak, mushrooms, red pepper, onion, smothered with alfredo sauce, hashbrowns, curd cheese, 2 poached eggs, hollandaise sauce and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: A poutine variation using steak and Alfredo sauce.

items.name: Breakfast Poutine
items.description: Hashbrowns, choice of meat, curd cheese, 2 poached eggs, hollandaise sauce and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: A hearty breakfast poutine option.

items.name: Philly Steak Benedict
items.description: Sliced steak, mushroom, onions, red pepper and smothered with alfredo sauce, on a homemade waffle, topped with 2 soft poached eggs, hollandaise sauce, hashbrowns and fruits.
items.simplified_description: A creative twist on eggs Benedict with steak.

items.name: Classic Benedict
items.description: Shaved ham on a waffle, 2 soft poached eggs, hollandaise sauce, hashbrowns and fruits.
items.simplified_description: A traditional eggs Benedict served on a waffle.

items.name: Spicy Steak Benedict
items.description: Spicy horseradish steak, mushrooms, onions, on a homemade waffle, topped with 2 soft poached eggs, hollandaise sauce, hashbrowns and fruits.
items.simplified_description: A spicy take on traditional eggs Benedict.

items.name: Veggie Benedict
items.description: Grilled asparagus, tomato, mushroom, onion, spinach on a homemade waffle, topped with 2 soft poached eggs, hollandaise sauce, hashbrowns and fruits.
items.simplified_description: A vegetarian version of the eggs Benedict.

items.name: Farmers Omelette
items.description: Chopped chorizo, ham, bacon, onions, tomatoes, red and green peppers mushrooms and mixed cheese, served with hashbrowns or salad and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: A hearty omelette packed with ingredients.

items.name: All Meat Omelete
items.description: Ham, chorizo, bacon, maple sausage, mixed cheese, served with hashbrowns or salad and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: An omelette loaded with various meats.

items.name: Veggie Omelete
items.description: Grilled asparagus, red and green peppers, onions, mushroom, tomatoes, spinach and mixed cheese, served with hashbrowns or salad, and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: A vegetable-packed omelette option.

items.name: Ham & Cheese Omelete
items.description: Chopped ham, mixed cheese, served with hashbrowns or salad and choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: A simple omelette with ham and cheese.

items.name: Avocado Toast
items.description: Two slices of multigrain bread, fresh avocado, tomatoes, toasted almonds, 2 fried eggs and choice of salad.
items.simplified_description: A healthy breakfast option featuring avocado.

items.name: Chorizo Breakfast Wrap
items.description: Spicy chorizo, red onion, jalapeno, lettuce, tomato, scrambled eggs with green onion, mixed cheese, ranch, wrapped in whole wheat tortilla. Served with hashbrowns or salad.
items.simplified_description: A spicy breakfast wrap with chorizo.

items.name: BLT Egg Wrap
items.description: Bacon, lettuce, tomato, scrambled eggs, mayo, mixed cheese, wrapped in whole wheat tortilla. Served with hashbrowns or salad.
items.simplified_description: A breakfast wrap featuring classic BLT ingredients.

items.name: Banana Nutella Waffle
items.description: Waffle filled with banana, topped with Nutella.
items.simplified_description: A dessert-style breakfast waffle with banana and chocolate spread.

items.name: Choco Banana Pancake
items.description: Chocolate pancake filled with banana and chocolate chip.
items.simplified_description: A sweet pancake option with chocolate and banana filling.
